name: Homework
description: The physical manifestation of the homework you forgot was due today. It has been sitting in your backpack since Thursday. It knows. It has always known. It gains power every time a student opens a new tab instead of working on it. Its final form is a 10-page essay due in 20 minutes that you haven't started. It feeds on the phrase 'I'll do it after dinner.' You did not do it after dinner. You watched YouTube for four hours and went to sleep.

moves.name: 📅 Due Tomorrow
moves.desc: Appears at 11:58pm to remind you it was due yesterday actually. Deals massive psychic damage as the opponent realizes they have been lied to by their own memory.

moves.name: 🌐 New Tab
moves.desc: Opens 47 new browser tabs. The opponent's speed is sharply lowered as their laptop fan begins screaming and their RAM hits 100%.

moves.name: 👀 Can I Copy Yours
moves.desc: Slides over and copies the opponent's entire moveset for one turn. ATK sharply rises. Homeworkmon changes one word so it's not plagiarism. It is plagiarism.

moves.name: 🐶 Dog Ate It
moves.desc: Presents a note from its dog. The teacher has heard this before. Deals light damage and lowers the opponent's defense as they try to decide if they believe it. They do not believe it.

moves.name: ⭐ Extra Credit
moves.desc: Turns in extra credit nobody asked for to compensate for seven missing assignments. Restores 25 HP through sheer audacity.

moves.name: 😭 Group Project
moves.desc: Assigns the opponent to a group project where they do all the work. Poisons them with resentment AND confuses them because three teammates just put their names on it and got the same grade.
